texto: My fear is that of all the choices people face today, the one they rarely consider is, "How can I serve most effectively and fruitfully in the local church?" texto: The irony is that if we make every imperative into a command to believe the gospel more fully, we turn the gospel into one more thing we have to get right, and faith becomes the one thing we need to be better at.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kevin DeYoung sobre temas ligados a fe. A afirmação “The irony is that if we make every imperative into a command to believe the gospel more fully, we…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, faith, gospel, útil em momentos de gospel e imperatives.
